name: kafka-stream-filter
title: Kafka Stream Filter
description: Evaluates a predicate (or a multi-predicate AND/OR chain) against a Kafka message. Enterprise-ready: multi-predicate chains with configurable AND/OR logic, per-predicate regex, ErrorMessage DLQ output for evaluation failures.

display.name: Field Name
display.description: Single-predicate mode: name of the message field to evaluate. Leave empty when using the 'predicates' setting (multi-predicate mode).

display.name: Operator
display.description: Single-predicate mode: comparison operator. Numeric operators apply numeric comparison when both sides parse as numbers; otherwise falls back to string. Not used in multi-predicate mode.

display.name: Compare Value
display.description: Single-predicate mode: value to compare the field against. For regex, provide a Go regex (e.g. ^sensor-[0-9]+$). Not used in multi-predicate mode.

display.name: Pass Through on Missing Field
display.description: When true, messages where the configured field does not exist will pass through. Applies to both single and multi-predicate modes.

display.name: Predicates (JSON)
display.description: Enterprise: JSON array of predicates for multi-predicate evaluation. Example: [{"field":"price","operator":"gt","value":"100"},{"field":"region","operator":"eq","value":"US"}]. When set, this takes priority over the single-predicate settings.

display.name: Predicate Mode
display.description: Enterprise: how multiple predicates are combined. 'and' (default): all predicates must pass. 'or': at least one predicate must pass.

display.name: Message
display.description: Kafka message payload as a key-value object. Map from the Kafka Consumer trigger.

display.name: Passed
display.description: True if the message passed all configured predicates. Use in a branch condition to skip downstream processing for filtered messages.

display.name: Message
display.description: Passthrough of the original input message. Populated only when passed=true.

display.name: Filter Reason
display.description: Human-readable explanation of why the message was filtered out. Empty when passed=true.

display.name: Error Message
display.description: Enterprise: non-empty when the predicate evaluation itself failed (e.g. type coercion error). Route messages with a non-empty errorMessage to a dead-letter branch independently from normal filter failures (passed=false).
